title: keetia zanzibarica subsp. gentilii
intro: Keetia zanzibarica subsp. gentilii, also known as the Gentil's keetia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Keetia zanzibarica subsp. gentilii include the treatment of fever, pain, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by boiling the leaves and roots in water to create a tea or infusion, which can be used to treat various ailments.
